items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to agent-specific rate limits. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. The linked use cases and prior steps do not directly address the expected outcome of the scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
